holdings.infoBox: REVS is an equity ETF with a total of 312 individual holdings. The top holdings are Wells Fargo & Company stock at 3.90%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 3.66%, Exxon Mobil at 3.41%, Alphabet at 3.02%, and Cisco Systems at 2.87%.

overview.description: The Columbia Research Enhanced Value ETF (REVS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of US stocks pulled from the Russell 1000 Value Index. REVS index uses multifactor selection and market cap weighting. REVS was launched on Sep 25, 2019 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
infoTable: Beta Advantage Research Enhanced US Value Index
